title: Extra Disks
description: Extra Disks adds bigger disks to Refined Storage 1.14+
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/extra-disks/header.png) Extra Disks is an add-on for [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) which adds much bigger item and fluid disks.

![Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/extra-disks/overview.png) You can store infinite amount of items and fluids in each of the corresponding disk. That should be enough for... water and cobblestone? ![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/extra-disks/creative_tab.png)
You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like. ![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/extra-disks/promo.png) #Werbung #Ad
